ID=g17281.t1;Parent=g17281;em_target=48698.ENSPFOP00000009854;em_score=635.0;em_evalue=9.44e-234;em_tcov=100.0;em_OGs=KOG3071@1|root,KOG3071@2759|Eukaryota,39X7S@33154|Opisthokonta,3BMJJ@33208|Metazoa,3D5YQ@33213|Bilateria,48C47@7711|Chordata,48VSV@7742|Vertebrata,49Y00@7898|Actinopterygii;em_COG_cat=I;em_desc=Catalyzes the first and rate-limiting reaction of the four that constitute the long-chain fatty acids elongation cycle. This endoplasmic reticulum-bound enzymatic process, allows the addition of 2 carbons to the chain of long- and very long-chain fatty acids VLCFAs per cycle. Condensing enzyme that exhibits activity toward saturated C18 to C26 acyl-CoA substrates, with the highest activity towards C22 0 acyl-CoA.
